name: sorbitol
description: Sorbitol is a sugar alcohol used as a low-calorie sweetener and humectant in food products.
raw_text: Sorbitol (Explained + Products) Products Ingredients Decode INCI Login Register Login Register Products Ingredients Decode INCI Follow us on our new Insta page » Sorbitol What-it-does: moisturizer/humectant Irritancy: 0 Comedogenicity: 0 Official CosIng Information All Functions: humectant, plasticiser, skin conditioning CAS #: 50-70-4 | EC #: 200-061-5 Ph. Eur. Name: Sorbitolum | Chemical/IUPAC Name: D-Glucitol Details It's a sweet tasting sugar substitute that helps your skin to hold onto water when used in cosmetic products. It also helps to thicken up products and give them a bit more slip. [more] [more] [less] Something incorrect or missing? Let us know!
